style%22)%3B%20style.id%20%3D%20FBINSPECTOR_STYLE_ID%3B%20style.textContent%20%3D%20baseStyles%3B%20document.head.appendChild(style)%3B%20return%20style%3B%20%7D%3B%20var%20mountRoot%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20root%20%3D%20document.createElement(%22div%22)%3B%20root.id%20%3D%20FBINSPECTOR_ROOT_ID%3B%20document.body.appendChild(root)%3B%20return%20root%3B%20%7D%3B%20var%20createInstance%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20style%20%3D%20mountStyles()%3B%20const%20root%20%3D%20mountRoot()%3B%20const%20shell%20%3D%20createShell(%7B%20root%20%7D)%3B%20return%20%7B%20destroy()%20%7B%20shell.destroy()%3B%20safeRemoveNode(root)%3B%20safeRemoveNode(style)%3B%20if%20(window%5BFBINSPECTOR_INSTANCE_KEY%5D%20%3D%3D%3D%20this)%20%7B%20delete%20window%5BFBINSPECTOR_INSTANCE_KEY%5D%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20%7D%3B%20var%20launch%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20existing%20%3D%20window%5BFBINSPECTOR_INSTANCE_KEY%5D%3B%20if%20(existing%20%26%26%20typeof%20existing.destroy%20%3D%3D%3D%20%22function%22)%20%7B%20existing.destroy()%3B%20%7D%20const%20instance%20%3D%20createInstance()%3B%20window%5BFBINSPECTOR_INSTANCE_KEY%5D%20%3D%20instance%3B%20logger.info(%22%5Cu0418%5Cu043D%5Cu0438%5Cu0446%5Cu0438%5Cu0430%5Cu043B%5Cu0438%5Cu0437%5Cu0430%5Cu0446%5Cu0438%5Cu044F%20%5Cu0437%5Cu0430%5Cu0432%5Cu0435%5Cu0440%5Cu0448%5Cu0435%5Cu043D%5Cu0430%22)%3B%20return%20instance%3B%20%7D%3B%20launch()%3B%20%7D)()%3B
